creator: exploringlondon
caption:
This is our ULTIMATE MAP OF LONDON! ✨ With 300+ recommendations of the best spots in London, all in one place, which you can filter by activities, cafes, restaurants, hotels and so much more!
💵 It’s a ONE OFF purchase for unlimited LIFETIME access to the map FOREVER, so as we add more recommendations, you’ll get them all!
✨ Because you can see everything in one map, you can see what’s next each other to help with planning your days in London
✨ We can also make your itinerary for you, to help make planning your trip that much easier!
✨ There’s direct ticket booking links for a lot of the activities so that you can get your tickets straight away and we’ve included exclusive discount codes for some activities too ❤️
🗺️
📍 LINK IN BIO, use code SUMMER20 for 20% off until the end of August!

#londonmap #londonguide #thingstodoinlondon #londontrip
